title: Draw a 3-layer neural network
description: Draw a 3-layer neural network for predicting if a student passes. Inputs: attendance percentage and average marks. Output: Pass or Fail. Label all nodes and draw arrows showing the flow.

title: Weighted Sum
description: Write Python to calculate a weighted sum of two inputs — simulate one neural network node. Input1 = 0.8 (attendance), Input2 = 0.9 (marks), Weight1 = 0.6, Weight2 = 0.4. Print the output.
